arts.sum: Manchester United will be hoping to record a first Premier League victory in three matches when they host Ipswich at Old Trafford this evening. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score predicti...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim sent Antony on loan after he 'took the mick' out of his Man Utd team-mates
arts.sum: Antony has struggled to make an impact at Manchester United since his £85million move from Ajax, but a former coach has revealed the depth of the winger's talent

arts.ttl: 'Cristiano Ronaldo made his Man Utd debut in place of me - what he did was different'
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo made his Manchester United debut against Bolton Wanderers in August 2003 and club icon Nicky Butt has revealed what surprised him most about the star

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy has just repeated brutal Ruben Amorim move at Leicester City
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy departed Manchester United the day Ruben Amorim began work as the club's head coach and has now made a similarly ruthless move at Leicester City

arts.ttl: Man Utd face staggering cost if they sack Ruben Amorim thanks to lucrative contract clause
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has endured a difficult start to life at Old Trafford and while his future appears secure for now, he is under pressure to find results
